title: T-030 — UI: FIN-006/016 D365 Integration page + MODAL-08 Replay + MODAL-09 Resolve (fin_d365_integration)
prompt:
# T-030 — FIN-006/016 D365 Integration UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.1 FIN-006 (PRD numbering, aka UX FIN-016); §8.4 FIN-016 [INDUSTRY-CONFIG]; §8.5 MODAL-08 + MODAL-09; §12.6 ops UI; §12.8 config (dataAreaId=FNOR, ApexDG, FinGoods).
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/other-screens.jsx:144-360` (`fin_d365_integration`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:465-505` (`dlq_replay_modal`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:507-537` (`dlq_resolve_modal`)

## Goal
Server Component page `/finance/d365` with 5 tabs (Daily Batches / Outbox Queue / DLQ / GL Mapping / Settings) + Connection Status card + 4 KPI tiles + 2 modals (MODAL-08 Replay / MODAL-09 Resolve).

## Prototype parity
References pinned above.
shadcn primitives: Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, Card, Table, Badge, Button, Alert, Tooltip + Dialog/Form/Textarea/Checkbox for modals.
Parity checklist (page):
1. Connection Status Card: green/red dot with CSS pulse animation when connected; env, dataAreaId (`[INDUSTRY-CONFIG]` marker = FNOR), warehouse (`[ORG-CONFIG]` ApexDG), consolidation cutoff (23:00 UTC), uptime 30d, last successful post, 'Test Connection' Button → `pingD365()` from T-029, 'Configure' Link → /finance/settings#d365.
2. 4 KPI mini-cards: WO Cost Events Pending (next batch ETA), Daily Batches 30d, D365 Journal Lines last batch, DLQ Open (variant='destructive' when >0). 'DLQ Open' clickable → tab=dlq.
3. Sticky alert bar when DLQ > 0: amber Alert above tabs 'N DLQ events require resolution'.
4. Tab 'Daily Batches': Table columns Batch Date, ID, Status (D365BatchStatus badge), Line Count, Total Debit GBP, D365 Journal ID, Posted At, Reconciled.
5. Tab 'Outbox Queue': Table Event ID, Type, WO Ref, Status, Attempt Count, Next Retry, Last Error (Tooltip on truncate), Enqueued At; auto-refresh 30s via SWR.
6. Tab 'DLQ': Table DLQ ID, Source Event, Type, Error Category badge (DlqCategoryBadge: permanent=destructive, transient=warning), Error Message (expandable), Attempts, Moved/Resolved metadata; Replay → MODAL-08 + Resolve → MODAL-09; retry schedule note 'immediate→+5m→+30m→+2h→+12h→+24h'.
7. Tab 'GL Mapping': Table cost_category, D365 Account Code (mono font `[ORG-CONFIG]`), Offset Account, Journal Name=PROD, Last Updated, Updated By; row Edit → MODAL-13 (T-006 cost_center_gl_mapping_modal — reuse).
8. Tab 'Settings': D365 Integration Enabled toggle gated by feature flag, Consolidation Cutoff Time, Reconciliation Schedule read-only.
9. State banners: disconnected (red Alert), DLQ-alert (amber), all-clear (green Alert with subtle styling), empty-DLQ.

Parity checklist (MODAL-08 Replay):
1. Dialog 'default'; primary Button 'Replay Event' (not destructive coloring since replay is recovery).
2. Permanent category warning Alert variant='warning' AlertTriangleIcon when r.category='permanent'.
3. SummaryList: DLQ ID, Event Type, Source Event, Category, Attempts, Moved to DLQ At.
4. Last Error preformatted block inside ScrollArea max-h-24 text-red-700.
5. Reason Textarea (min 20 chars) with live char counter.
6. On Submit → calls `replayDlqEvent` from T-029; surfaces server error 'Permanent errors require admin replay' if non-admin tries permanent.

Parity checklist (MODAL-09 Resolve):
1. Dialog 'default'; destructive Button 'Mark Resolved'.
2. Info Alert variant='default' explaining manual resolution path.
3. Notes Textarea (min 30 chars) with char counter.
4. Acknowledgement Checkbox required (Zod literal(true)).
5. On Submit → calls `resolveDlqEvent` from T-029.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/d365/page.tsx` — RSC parallel fetches connection status + KPIs + 4 tabs' first pages.
2. `app/finance/d365/_components/connection-status-card.tsx`.
3. `app/finance/d365/_components/d365-tabs-client.tsx` — client wrapper for tab state + modal state.
4. `app/finance/d365/_components/daily-batches-tab.tsx`, `outbox-queue-tab.tsx`, `dlq-tab.tsx`, `gl-mapping-tab.tsx`, `settings-tab.tsx`.
5. `app/finance/d365/_components/dlq-replay-modal.tsx`, `dlq-resolve-modal.tsx`.
6. Shared `app/finance/_components/dlq-category-badge.tsx`, `d365-batch-status-badge.tsx`.
7. RBAC: `fin.dlq.replay` + `fin.dlq.resolve` to view DLQ tab; `fin.cost_center.admin` to edit GL Mapping.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/connection-status-card.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/d365-tabs-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/daily-batches-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/outbox-queue-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/dlq-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/gl-mapping-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/settings-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/dlq-replay-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/dlq-resolve-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/dlq-category-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/d365-batch-status-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/d365/_components/__tests__/*.test.tsx [create] (one per tab + 2 modals)

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/other-screens.jsx:144-360, then Connection Status + 4 KPI tiles + 5 tabs match — RTL snapshot + parity checklist. AND given GL Mapping Edit Button clicked, when modal opens, then MODAL-13 (T-006) renders correctly.
- Given DLQ count > 0, when page renders, then sticky amber Alert above tabs + DLQ KPI tile variant='destructive'. AND given user lacks fin.dlq.replay/resolve, when page renders, then DLQ tab hidden.
- Given MODAL-08 for permanent-category and non-admin user, when Submit, then server error 'Permanent errors require admin replay' surfaces; modal stays open. AND given MODAL-08 reason length 15, when Submit, then Zod min(20) blocks with FormMessage.
- Given MODAL-09 acknowledge unchecked, when Submit, then Zod literal(true) blocks with FormMessage. AND given MODAL-09 Submit succeeds, when modal closes, then DLQ tab refreshes and row shows resolved_at. AND given Outbox Queue tab mounted 31s, when network log inspected, then refresh request at ~30s.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 10→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: one test per tab + 2 modal tests; assert parity, SWR 30s, RBAC tab gating, permanent-category server error surfacing, Zod blocks, MODAL-13 reuse.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/d365`.

## Risk red lines
- D365 integration is strictly export-only (R15 anti-corruption contract per `_foundation/contracts/`) — MUST NOT mutate `factory_release_state` or any other canonical Monopilot state.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not use HTML `<select>`.
- Do not skip the sticky alert when DLQ > 0 (operator must see it).
- Do not log raw D365 OAuth tokens in console.
- Do not bypass RBAC on DLQ tab (sensitive ops).
- Do not skip retry schedule informational note.
- Do not regress accessibility (each tab has aria-controls/labelledby).
